category_title: Students with mild disabilities exhibiting low academic engagement and passive off-task behaviors
minimal_context: The student is expected to complete a math worksheet independently at their desk during a whole-group instructional session.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please take out your pencil and complete the math problems on your worksheet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks around the classroom without picking up the pencil or looking at the paper)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Go ahead and start working on the paper.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Picks up the pencil but just taps it repeatedly against the desk, showing no attention to the math task)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to write down your answers.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Puts the pencil down, doing nothing, and continues to look around the room while playing with their fingers)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please take out your pencil and complete the math problems on your worksheet.

STUDENT: (Looks around the classroom without picking up the pencil or looking at the paper)

TUTOR: Go ahead and start working on the paper.

STUDENT: (Picks up the pencil but just taps it repeatedly against the desk, showing no attention to the math task)

TUTOR: You need to write down your answers.

STUDENT: (Puts the pencil down, doing nothing, and continues to look around the room while playing with their fingers)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: during these conditions such as paper-pen activities
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: attention decreased and no task behaviors
